analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），宏观环境矛盾（VIX高+DXY强 vs 日元弱），但Layer 2新闻结构性看涨。Qlib排名显示BTC（0.1671）和ETH（0.1257）相对最强，但Z-Score显示资金费率偏高（BTC 1.75，ETH 1.36），零售多头拥挤。结合【痛苦交易】，SOL和BNB存在显著轧空燃料（L/S比率0.14和0.01），但需等待RSI极端或影线确认。选择【假设分析】剧本3（鲸鱼前置交易），基于SOL的鲸鱼净流入（24h 151万SOL）和负资金费率（-0.0040%），但当前RSI 58.3未达超卖，需谨慎右侧入场。

Qlib ranks BTC (0.1671) and ETH (0.1257) as strongest, but Z-Scores show high funding rates (BTC 1.75, ETH 1.36), indicating crowded retail longs. Combining 【Pain Trade】, SOL and BNB have significant squeeze fuel (L/S ratios 0.14 and 0.01), but require extreme RSI or wick confirmation. Selecting 【Scenario】3 (Whale Front-Run) based on SOL's whale net inflow (24h 1.514M SOL) and negative funding (-0.0040%), but current RSI 58.3 is not oversold, requiring cautious right-side entry.

Final Verdict: For SOL and BNB, with very low L/S ratios and RSI not overbought (<70), not KNIFE or ROCKET, but caution needed to avoid chasing; overall, SAFE_MR conditions insufficient as RSI not extreme.

analysis_summary.zh:
【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），但Qlib排名显示DOGE、BTC、ETH相对强势，与宏观熊市形成分歧。这可能是已定价的局部反弹，而非新驱动力。

【Narrative vs Reality】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200), but Qlib rankings show DOGE, BTC, ETH as relatively strong, diverging from the macro bearishness. This likely represents a priced-in local rebound rather than a new impulse driver.
【Pain Trade & Discipline】BTC and SOL have clear squeeze fuel (L/S ratios 0.44 and 0.09), but RSI is overbought (BTC 70.6, SOL 66.3) with no whale inflow confirmation, posing 'ROCKET' risks. DOGE ranks #1 but lacks whale data, relying solely on technicals.
【Scenario Selection】Adopt the 'Whale Front-Run' scenario: prioritize ETH with whale inflow evidence (24h 1.055M ETH), but wait for RSI pullback or clear support signals to avoid chasing.

Verdict: ROCKET — overbought RSI without strong whale confirmation makes chasing risky.

Price action suggests these positives may be partially priced in, as major coins remain in bear markets (price < SMA200) with elevated RSI (65-70), indicating potential exhaustion. Referencing 【Qlib rankings】, DOGE (rank 1) and BTC (rank 2) show relative strength, but DOGE's RSI 68.5 and funding Z-Score 1.44 (high) suggest retail FOMO risk. Combining 【Pain Trade】, BTC and SOL have high short squeeze fuel (L/S ratios 0.44 and 0.10), but RSI above 65 violates left-side entry rules (RSI<30 or 4H lower wick confirmation). Selected 【Scenario】3 (Whale Front-Run): monitor whale accumulation signals (e.g., ETH's token net inflow 1.055M ETH), but await technical confirmation to avoid chasing.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），但特朗普支持加密货币的新闻带来积极情绪，形成叙事与现实的分歧：宏观风险指标（DXY走强、VIX高位）显示风险规避，而新闻面却推动乐观情绪，这可能是已定价的利好，需警惕追高风险。【Qlib排名】DOGE排名第一（qlib_score 0.361），但技术面RSI 67.44偏高，资金费率Z-Score 1.44显示多头拥挤，存在回调风险；BTC排名第二，但RSI 70.53超买，且无鲸鱼数据支持，需谨慎。【痛苦交易与纪律】ETH和SOL显示明显的空头挤压信号（L/S比率低），但RSI未达极端（ETH 66.3，SOL 61.3），且无右端突破确认，避免追涨；DOGE资金费率正且高，但无鲸鱼数据，仅靠技术面风险高。选择【假设分析】剧本3（鲸鱼前置）：优先关注有鲸鱼流入且空头挤压的资产（如SOL），但等待右端突破确认。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200), but Trump's crypto support news creates positive sentiment, leading to a divergence: macro risk indicators (DXY strengthening, VIX high) signal risk-off, while news drives optimism, likely priced-in, warranting caution against chasing rallies. 【Qlib Ratings】DOGE ranks first (qlib_score 0.361), but technicals show RSI 67.44 elevated and funding Z-Score 1.44 indicates crowded longs, posing pullback risk; BTC ranks second, but RSI 70.53 is overbought and lacks whale data support, requiring prudence. 【Pain Trade & Discipline】ETH and SOL show clear short squeeze signals (low L/S ratios), but RSI is not extreme (ETH 66.3, SOL 61.3) and no right-side breakout confirmation exists, avoiding premature entries; DOGE has positive and high funding but no whale data, relying solely on technicals is risky. Selected 【Scenario】3 (Whale Front-Run): prioritize assets with whale inflows and squeeze potential (e.g., SOL), but await right-side confirmation.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：多数资产RSI偏高（BTC 70.53超买，DOGE 67.44，ETH 66.3），ADX中等（15-21），显示趋势强度一般；波动率NATR在2-3%区间，属正常范围；上下影线比率显示部分支撑（如ETH上影45%）。
technical_signal.en: Technicals: Most assets have elevated RSI (BTC 70.53 overbought, DOGE 67.44, ETH 66.3), ADX moderate (15-21) indicating weak trend strength; volatility NATR in 2-3% range, normal; wick ratios show some support (e.g., ETH upper wick 45%).

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：ETH有显著代币净流入（1,055,947.6 ETH），但稳定币净流出（-$3,777,227），信号矛盾；SOL代币净流入（1,938,056.3 SOL）且稳定币净流入（$831,438），显示积累。资金费率：DOGE和BNB高达0.0100%，多头拥挤；ETH 0.0076%正，但空头挤压信号强（L/S比率0.45）。
macro_onchain.en: Whale Data: ETH shows significant token net inflow (1,055,947.6 ETH) but stablecoin net outflow (-$3,777,227), mixed signals; SOL has token net inflow (1,938,056.3 SOL) and stablecoin net inflow ($831,438), indicating accumulation. Funding Rates: DOGE and BNB high at 0.0100%, crowded longs; ETH 0.0076% positive but strong short squeeze signal (L/S ratio 0.45).

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib分析：DOGE排名第一（qlib_score 0.361），但成交量Z-Score 0.61和资金费率Z-Score 1.44显示统计异常，可能过热；BTC排名第二（qlib_score 0.3041），但成交量Z-Score -0.61和资金费率Z-Score -0.42无显著异常。Z-Score异常支持DOGE的强势，但高值警告回调风险。
quantitative_analysis.en: Quantitative Analysis: Qlib ranks DOGE first (qlib_score 0.361), but volume Z-Score 0.61 and funding Z-Score 1.44 show statistical anomalies, possibly overheated; BTC ranks second (qlib_score 0.3041), but volume Z-Score -0.61 and funding Z-Score -0.42 show no significant anomalies. Z-Score anomalies support DOGE's strength but high values warn of pullback risk.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI偏高（BTC 70.53，DOGE 67.44），ADX中等（15-21），NATR正常（2-3%）；2) 上下影线比率：ETH上影45%显示阻力，SOL下影12%显示支撑；3) 多空爆仓比：ETH、SOL、BTC的L/S比率低（0.45、0.12、0.11），空头挤压燃料充足；4) 鲸鱼净流向：ETH和SOL代币流入，但ETH稳定币流出矛盾。最终判断：对于追涨（如DOGE、BTC）为ROCKET（挡火箭风险），因RSI高且无鲸鱼确认；对于回调买入（如SOL）为SAFE_MR（安全均值回归），因有鲸鱼积累和挤压信号，但需右端突破。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI elevated (BTC 70.53, DOGE 67.44), ADX moderate (15-21), NATR normal (2-3%); 2) Wick Ratios: ETH upper wick 45% shows resistance, SOL lower wick 12% shows support; 3) Liquidation L/S Ratios: low for ETH, SOL, BTC (0.45, 0.12, 0.11), ample short squeeze fuel; 4) Whale Net Flow: token inflow for ETH and SOL, but ETH stablecoin outflow is contradictory. Final Verdict: For chasing rallies (e.g., DOGE, BTC) is ROCKET (blocking rocket risk), due to high RSI and lack of whale confirmation; for buying dips (e.g., SOL) is SAFE_MR (safe mean reversion), due to whale accumulation and squeeze signals, but requires right-side breakout.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场呈现宏观与政策背离：VIX飙升（20.76）和BTC恐惧贪婪指数10显示极端恐惧，但特朗普支持加密货币立法的政治新闻构成强烈看涨叙事，价格未充分反应政策利好，存在潜在定价不足。参考Qlib排名，DOGE（排名1）和BTC（排名2）相对强势，但DOGE的funding_z=1.44（统计显著偏高）显示零售多头拥挤，而BTC的funding_z=-0.25相对中性。结合痛苦交易分析，BTC、ETH、SOL、BNB均出现SHORT_SQUEEZE信号（L/S比率0.07-0.39），但RSI普遍偏高（64-73），缺乏左侧超卖条件，需等待右侧突破确认。选择【Whale Front-Run】剧本，关注鲸鱼持续流入的SOL（24h token net flow 1.94M SOL）和ETH（24h token net flow 1.06M ETH），但必须遵守战场纪律，避免在RSI高位追涨。
analysis_summary.en: Narrative vs Reality Check: The market shows macro-policy divergence—VIX spike (20.76) and BTC Fear & Greed Index 10 indicate extreme fear, but Trump's pro-crypto legislation news creates a strong bullish narrative, with prices not fully pricing in the policy tailwind, suggesting potential underpricing. Per Qlib rankings, DOGE (rank 1) and BTC (rank 2) show relative strength, but DOGE's funding_z=1.44 (statistically high) signals crowded retail longs, while BTC's funding_z=-0.25 is neutral. Pain Trade analysis reveals SHORT_SQUEEZE signals for BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB (L/S ratios 0.07-0.39), but RSI is elevated (64-73), lacking oversold conditions for left-side entries, requiring right-side breakout confirmation. Selected Scenario: Whale Front-Run, focusing on SOL (24h token net flow 1.94M SOL) and ETH (24h token net flow 1.06M ETH) with whale accumulation, but must adhere to tactical discipline to avoid chasing highs at high RSI.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：所有币种RSI偏高（DOGE 69.44, BTC 73.19, ETH 69.16, BNB 67.13, SOL 64.88），处于超买边缘；ADX中等（15-22），趋势强度一般；NATR在2-3%区间，波动率正常；上下影线比率显示SOL下影线55%（支撑较强），BTC下影线73%（超卖反弹可能）。

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：SOL和ETH显示24h token net flow大幅正流入（SOL 1.94M, ETH 1.06M），表明鲸鱼在价格调整中积累；资金费率方面，DOGE和BNB为0.0100%（偏高），零售多头拥挤，而SOL为-0.0021%（轻微负值），存在轧空燃料。爆仓痛苦：BTC、ETH、SOL、BNB的L/S比率极低（0.07-0.39），显示空头爆仓主导，但RSI未超卖，需警惕追高风险。
macro_onchain.en: Whale Flow: SOL and ETH show large positive 24h token net flow (SOL 1.94M, ETH 1.06M), indicating whale accumulation during price dips; Funding rates: DOGE and BNB at 0.0100% (high), crowded retail longs, while SOL at -0.0021% (slightly negative), providing squeeze fuel. Liquidation Pain: BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB have very low L/S ratios (0.07-0.39), dominated by short liquidations, but RSI not oversold, warning against chasing highs.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib分析：DOGE排名第一（qlib_score 0.3679），但funding_z=1.44显著偏高，统计异常提示零售多头过度拥挤；BTC排名第二（qlib_score 0.324），funding_z=-0.25相对中性，无显著异常；SOL排名第五（qlib_score 0.2322），funding_z=0.06接近中性，但token net flow强劲支持鲸鱼剧本。
quantitative_analysis.en: Quantitative: Qlib ranks DOGE #1 (qlib_score 0.3679), but funding_z=1.44 is statistically high, indicating excessive retail long crowding; BTC ranks #2 (qlib_score 0.324), funding_z=-0.25 neutral, no significant anomaly; SOL ranks #5 (qlib_score 0.2322), funding_z=0.06 near neutral, but strong token net flow supports whale front-run scenario.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI普遍65-73偏高，ADX 15-22中等，NATR 2-3%正常；2) 上下影线比率：SOL下影线55%/上影线10%，显示支撑强于阻力，BTC下影线73%极高；3) 多空爆仓比：L/S比率0.07-0.39，空头爆仓主导；4) 鲸鱼净流向：SOL和ETH token net flow正流入。综合判断：当前为ROCKET（挡火箭风险），因为RSI高位且上升趋势中，空头爆仓提供燃料，但缺乏超买峰值或拒绝蜡烛，禁止左侧做空；均值回归条件不足（RSI未>72且无背离），需等待右侧确认。
regime_safety.en: Required: Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI elevated 65-73, ADX 15-22 moderate, NATR 2-3% normal; 2) Wick ratios: SOL lower wick 55%/upper 10%, support stronger than resistance, BTC lower wick 73% very high; 3) Liquidation L/S ratio: 0.07-0.39, short liquidations dominate; 4) Whale net flow: SOL and ETH token net flow positive. Verdict: ROCKET (blocking rocket risk), as RSI is high in uptrend, short liquidations provide fuel, but lacks overbought peak or rejection candles, forbidding left-side shorts; mean reversion not safe (RSI not >72 without divergence), await right-side confirmation.

Price action suggests priced-in—positive news hasn't driven breakout, indicating weak upward momentum. Per Qlib rankings, DOGE (rank 1) and BTC (rank 2) show relative strength, but DOGE's Funding Z-Score of 1.44 (statistically high) signals crowded retail longs. Pain trade analysis reveals SHORT_SQUEEZE signals for BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB (low L/S ratios), but RSI not below 30, lacking safe mean-reversion conditions. Selected Scenario 3 (Whale Front-Run), focusing on SOL with sustained whale accumulation (24h Token Net Flow 1.94M SOL), but awaiting right-side breakout confirmation to avoid left-side risk.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于矛盾状态：宏观层面呈现风险规避（DXY走强，VIX高位），但Layer 2新闻极度看涨，形成叙事分歧。价格走势与鲸鱼行为显示关键信号：BTC、ETH、SOL、BNB均处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），但所有币种都出现【SHORT_SQUEEZE】信号（空头爆仓远高于多头），尤其是BTC空头爆仓高达$1.6B（L/S比率0.10），表明零售空头过度拥挤。Qlib排名显示BTC（#1）和ETH（#2）相对最强，但它们的资金费率Z-Score（0.42和1.16）未达极端，而DOGE的资金费率Z-Score高达1.42（统计显著偏高），暗示零售多头过热。结合【痛苦交易】分析：当前空头爆仓是主要燃料，但RSI普遍在60-72区间（未超买），且无明确4H上影线拒绝，因此不宜立即做空；同时，价格未出现大幅下跌，缺乏左侧买入信号。选择【Whale Front-Run】剧本：关注鲸鱼持续积累的币种（如SOL 24h净流入1.9M代币），等待右侧突破确认。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a contradictory state: macro signals risk-off (DXY strengthening, VIX high), but Layer 2 news is overwhelmingly bullish, creating a narrative divergence. Price action and whale data reveal key signals: BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB are all in bear markets (price < SMA200), but all show 【SHORT_SQUEEZE】 signals (short liquidations far exceed longs), especially BTC with $1.6B short liquidations (L/S ratio 0.10), indicating overcrowded retail shorts. Qlib rankings show BTC (#1) and ETH (#2) as relatively strongest, but their funding Z-Scores (0.42 and 1.16) are not extreme, while DOGE's funding Z-Score is high at 1.42 (statistically significant), suggesting overheated retail longs. Combining 【Pain Trade】 analysis: current short liquidations are the primary fuel, but RSI is generally in the 60-72 range (not overbought), and no clear 4H upper wick rejections are present, so shorting immediately is not justified; meanwhile, prices haven't dropped significantly, lacking left-side buy signals. Selected 【Whale Front-Run】 scenario: focus on coins with sustained whale accumulation (e.g., SOL with 24h net inflow of 1.9M tokens), awaiting right-side breakout confirmation.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：所有币种RSI在63-72区间（BTC 71.78，ETH 69.21），处于中性偏强但未超买；ADX普遍低于25（SOL 18.4，BTC 18.3），趋势强度中等；NATR在1.82%-3.19%（BNB最低，SOL最高），波动率适中；上下影线比率显示BTC下影线占71%（支撑较强），SOL下影线占37%（支撑一般）。
technical_signal.en: Technical: All coins have RSI in the 63-72 range (BTC 71.78, ETH 69.21), neutral-strong but not overbought; ADX generally below 25 (SOL 18.4, BTC 18.3), moderate trend strength; NATR ranges 1.82%-3.19% (BNB lowest, SOL highest), moderate volatility; wick ratios show BTC with 71% lower wicks (strong support), SOL with 37% lower wicks (moderate support).

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据与资金费率：SOL出现显著鲸鱼积累（24h代币净流入1,938,056 SOL，稳定币净流入$831k），而ETH代币净流入但稳定币净流出（$-3.8M），暗示分歧。资金费率方面，DOGE（0.0098%）和BNB（0.0100%）较高，零售多头拥挤；SOL为负（-0.0021%），零售空头略多。爆仓数据显示所有币种空头爆仓远高于多头（L/S比率：BTC 0.10，ETH 0.39，SOL 0.12，BNB 0.01），形成轧空燃料。
macro_onchain.en: Whale flow & funding: SOL shows significant whale accumulation (24h token net inflow 1,938,056 SOL, stablecoin net inflow $831k), while ETH has token inflow but stablecoin outflow ($-3.8M), suggesting divergence. Funding rates: DOGE (0.0098%) and BNB (0.0100%) are high, indicating crowded retail longs; SOL is negative (-0.0021%), slightly crowded retail shorts. Liquidation data shows short liquidations far exceed longs across all coins (L/S ratios: BTC 0.10, ETH 0.39, SOL 0.12, BNB 0.01), creating squeeze fuel.

quantitative_analysis.zh: 分析Qlib排名：BTC（得分0.2915，排名#1）和ETH（0.2777，排名#2）相对最强，但它们的资金费率Z-Score（0.42和1.16）未达统计极端（>2），表明资金费率异常不显著。DOGE排名#3，但资金费率Z-Score高达1.42，接近显著水平，结合高资金费率（0.0098%），提示零售多头过热风险。SOL排名#5（得分0.2064），但鲸鱼积累强劲，形成量化与链上数据的背离。
quantitative_analysis.en: Analyze Qlib rankings: BTC (score 0.2915, rank #1) and ETH (0.2777, rank #2) are relatively strongest, but their funding Z-Scores (0.42 and 1.16) are not statistically extreme (>2), indicating funding anomalies are not significant. DOGE ranks #3, but its funding Z-Score is high at 1.42, nearing significance, combined with high funding rate (0.0098%), suggesting overheated retail long risk. SOL ranks #5 (score 0.2064), but has strong whale accumulation, creating a divergence between quantitative and on-chain data.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI在63-72（未超买），ADX<25（趋势不强），NATR适中（1.82%-3.19%）；2) 上下影线比率：BTC下影线71%（支撑强），但无上影线拒绝；3) 多空爆仓比：空头爆仓远高于多头（L/S比率均<0.5），显示空头被挤压；4) 鲸鱼净流向：SOL净流入显著，ETH稳定币净流出。综合判断：当前无【KNIFE】风险（价格未大跌，RSI未<30），无【ROCKET】风险（RSI未>70，ADX不高），但也不符合【SAFE_MR】（RSI未极端，无明确反转蜡烛）。市场处于中性偏强状态，等待右侧信号。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI in 63-72 (not overbought), ADX <25 (trend not strong), NATR moderate (1.82%-3.19%); 2) Wick ratios: BTC has 71% lower wicks (strong support), but no upper wick rejections; 3) Liquidation L/S ratios: short liquidations far exceed longs (all ratios <0.5), indicating shorts being squeezed; 4) Whale net flow: SOL shows significant inflow, ETH has stablecoin outflow. Verdict: No 【KNIFE】 risk (price not dropping sharply, RSI not <30), no 【ROCKET】 risk (RSI not >70, ADX not high), but not 【SAFE_MR】 either (RSI not extreme, no clear reversal candles). Market is neutral-strong, awaiting right-side signals.

Focus on whale-accumulated coins (e.g., SOL), but must await right-side breakout confirmation to prevent premature left-side entry.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于宏观风险规避环境（VIX 20.51，DXY 98.77），但政治叙事（特朗普支持加密）与监管进展（Kraken Fed账户）提供积极催化剂，形成分歧。价格走势显示为已定价的混合趋势，无明显新驱动力。参考【Qlib排名】，BTC（0.2399）和ETH（0.2303）相对最强，但所有币种RSI均处于60-68过热区间，Z-Score显示资金费率普遍偏高（ETH 1.0，DOGE 1.25），表明零售多头拥挤。结合【痛苦交易】，所有主要币种均显示SHORT_SQUEEZE信号（L/S比率极低：BTC 0.15，ETH 0.45，SOL 0.15，BNB 0.01），但RSI未达极端（>70），且ADX普遍<20（趋势弱），当前处于【战场纪律】的“火箭阻挡”风险区，不宜追高。选择【假设分析】剧本：等待均值回归机会，避免在RSI过热时开仓。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a macro risk-off environment (VIX 20.51, DXY 98.77), but political narratives (Trump's crypto support) and regulatory progress (Kraken Fed account) provide positive catalysts, creating a divergence. Price action shows a mixed trend with no clear new impulse, likely priced in. Referencing 【Qlib rankings】, BTC (0.2399) and ETH (0.2303) are relatively strongest, but all coins have RSI in the overbought 60-68 range, and Z-Scores indicate high funding rates (ETH 1.0, DOGE 1.25), signaling crowded retail longs. Combining 【Pain Trade】, all major coins show SHORT_SQUEEZE signals (extremely low L/S ratios: BTC 0.15, ETH 0.45, SOL 0.15, BNB 0.01), but RSI is not extreme (>70) and ADX is generally <20 (weak trend), placing us in the 【Tactical Discipline】'rocket blocking' risk zone—avoid chasing highs. Selected 【Scenario】: Wait for mean reversion opportunities, avoid opening positions at overheated RSI.

Statistical deviations support waiting for pullbacks.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI 61-68过热但未极端（>70），ADX<20趋势弱，NATR中等（2-3%）；2) 上下影线比率：ETH上影47%/下影7%，SOL上影10%/下影1%，显示部分上影线但下影线弱；3) 多空爆仓比极低（L/S<0.5），空头挤压燃料充足；4) 鲸鱼净流向：ETH代币流入但稳定币流出，SOL代币流入且稳定币流入。综合判断：当前处于ROCKET（挡火箭风险）状态，因为RSI过热、ADX弱、高资金费率显示零售多头拥挤，但空头挤压燃料可能推动进一步上涨，逆势开空或追多风险高。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI 61-68 overbought but not extreme (>70), ADX<20 weak trend, NATR moderate (2-3%); 2) Upper/Lower Wick Ratios: ETH upper 47%/lower 7%, SOL upper 10%/lower 1%, showing some upper wicks but weak lower wicks; 3) Liquidation L/S ratios extremely low (<0.5), short squeeze fuel abundant; 4) Whale net flow: ETH token inflow but stablecoin outflow, SOL token and stablecoin inflow. Verdict: ROCKET (blocking rocket risk), because RSI is overheated, ADX weak, high funding rates indicate crowded retail longs, but short squeeze fuel may drive further upside, making counter-trend shorts or chasing longs high-risk.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），但存在明显的鲸鱼与散户分歧。宏观环境显示风险规避（VIX飙升、DXY走强），但加密货币内部出现轧空燃料（BTC、ETH、BNB的短仓爆仓远高于长仓）。【Qlib排名】显示BTC（排名1）和BNB（排名2）相对强势，但Z-Score异常：BTC资金费率Z-Score为-0.07（轻微负值），BNB为0.89（正值），表明散户在BNB上做多拥挤，在BTC上略微做空。【痛苦交易】BTC、ETH、BNB的短仓爆仓比（L/S）极低（0.05、0.04、0.02），显示大量散户短仓被清算，为轧空提供燃料，但价格尚未突破关键阻力，需等待右侧确认。【假设分析】选择“鲸鱼前置”剧本：鲸鱼在价格下跌时积累（如ETH的24h情绪得分0.01高于7d的0.04），而散户恐慌性短仓被爆，可能引发轧空反弹。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200), but there is a clear divergence between whales and retail. Macro shows risk-off (VIX spiking, DXY strengthening), but crypto internal signals show squeeze fuel (short liquidations far exceed longs for BTC, ETH, BNB).【Qlib Ratings】indicate BTC (rank 1) and BNB (rank 2) are relatively strong, but Z-Score anomalies: BTC funding Z-Score is -0.07 (slightly negative), BNB is 0.89 (positive), showing retail longs crowded in BNB and slight shorts in BTC.【Pain Trade】Short liquidation ratios (L/S) for BTC, ETH, BNB are extremely low (0.05, 0.04, 0.02), indicating massive retail short liquidations providing squeeze fuel, but price hasn't broken key resistance—await right-side confirmation.【Scenario】Select 'Whale Front-Run' scenario: whales accumulating on dips (e.g., ETH's 24h sentiment 0.01 > 7d 0.04) while retail shorts are being liquidated, potentially triggering a squeeze bounce.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），宏观风险偏好下降（VIX飙升、DXY走强），但加密货币基础设施扩张等新闻与价格下跌形成分歧。Qlib排名显示BTC（0.1273）和BNB（0.1196）相对最强，而DOGE（-0.0646）最弱。Z-Score异常：BTC资金费率Z-Score为-1.21（显著负值），显示零售空头拥挤，但价格未大幅下跌，暗示潜在轧空燃料。结合【痛苦交易】，BTC清算比（L/S=0.40）显示空头清算远多于多头，若价格反弹可能引发轧空；但ADX普遍低于20（趋势不明），需等待右侧确认。选择【假设分析】剧本：监控BTC的潜在轧空机会，但优先等待ADX>20的信号。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200) with macro risk-off signals (VIX spiking, DXY strengthening), but news of crypto infrastructure expansion diverges from price declines. Qlib rankings show BTC (0.1273) and BNB (0.1196) as strongest, while DOGE (-0.0646) is weakest. Z-Score anomalies: BTC funding Z-Score is -1.21 (significantly negative), indicating crowded retail shorts, yet price hasn't dropped sharply, suggesting potential squeeze fuel. Combined with 【Pain Trade】, BTC liquidation ratio (L/S=0.40) shows shorts far exceeding longs, which could trigger a squeeze on a bounce; but ADX is mostly below 20 (no clear trend), requiring right-side confirmation. Selected 【Scenario】: Monitor BTC for a potential short squeeze, but prioritize waiting for ADX > 20 signals.

macro_onchain.en: Whale data: ETH 24h net inflow 77,807.2 ETH (positive), but stablecoin inflow $9.4M (neutral); SOL 24h net inflow 1,737,096.1 SOL (positive), but stablecoin inflow only $433K (weak). Funding: BTC -0.0031% (negative, crowded retail shorts), SOL 0.0040% (positive, slight retail longs). Liquidations: BTC short $649M vs long $263M (L/S=0.40), showing short pain and potential squeeze.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib分析：BTC排名第一（得分0.1273），BNB第二（0.1196），SOL第三（0.0796）。Z-Score显著性：BTC资金费率Z-Score -1.21（统计显著负偏差，零售空头过度），成交量Z-Score -1.32（低成交量异常）；DOGE资金费率Z-Score -0.85（负值但较弱）。这支持BTC作为轧空候选，但需结合趋势确认。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib analysis: BTC ranks #1 (score 0.1273), BNB #2 (0.1196), SOL #3 (0.0796). Z-Score significance: BTC funding Z-Score -1.21 (statistically significant negative deviation, excessive retail shorts), volume Z-Score -1.32 (low volume anomaly); DOGE funding Z-Score -0.85 (negative but weaker). This supports BTC as a squeeze candidate, but requires trend confirmation.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI中性（BTC 59.56，未超买超卖），ADX均低于20（趋势弱），NATR中等（2-3%）；2) 上下影线比率：BTC上影37%/下影34%（平衡），未显示强烈拒绝；3) 多空爆仓比：BTC L/S=0.40（空头清算主导），但未伴随价格暴跌；4) 鲸鱼净流向：ETH和SOL token流入积极，但稳定币流入弱。结论：当前非KNIFE（无RSI<30或下跌动量），非ROCKET（无RSI>70或上涨动量），也非SAFE_MR（无RSI极端值）。市场处于【趋势不明】状态，需等待ADX>20。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI neutral (BTC 59.56, not overbought/oversold), ADX all <20 (weak trend), NATR moderate (2-3%); 2) Wick ratios: BTC upper 37%/lower 34% (balanced), no strong rejection; 3) Liquidation ratio: BTC L/S=0.40 (short-dominated), but not paired with price crash; 4) Whale net flow: ETH and SOL token inflows positive, but stablecoin inflows weak. Verdict: Not KNIFE (no RSI<30 or falling momentum), not ROCKET (no RSI>70 or rising momentum), not SAFE_MR (no RSI extremes). Market is in 【trendless】 state, await ADX > 20.

Qlib rankings show BTC and BNB relatively strong, but Z-Scores indicate low volume (vol_z all <-1.5) and no significant funding anomalies. Selected 【Scenario】3 (Whale Front-Run), pending ADX >20 and price break above key resistance.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），宏观风险情绪主导（VIX 23.57，DXY 99.07），但存在结构性机会。Qlib排名显示SOL（#1）和BTC（#2）相对强势，但Z-Score显示成交量普遍低迷（所有币种vol_z < -1.65），表明市场缺乏动能。结合【痛苦交易】分析：BTC出现SHORT_SQUEEZE信号（空头爆仓$10.2亿 vs 多头$4.2亿，L/S比率0.41），但RSI 55.9未超卖，需等待右侧确认；SOL和ETH存在LONG_FLUSH风险（多头爆仓显著高于空头），但SOL有鲸鱼加速积累迹象（24h情绪0.60 vs 7d 0.24）。选择【假设分析】剧本3（鲸鱼前置）：跟随SOL鲸鱼积累信号，但严格等待ADX > 20和右侧突破确认，避免左侧接飞刀。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality】Market is in bear regime (price < SMA200) with macro risk-off dominance (VIX 23.57, DXY 99.07), but structural opportunities exist. Qlib ranks show SOL (#1) and BTC (#2) relatively strong, but Z-Scores indicate universally low volume (all vol_z < -1.65), signaling lack of momentum. 【Pain Trade】analysis: BTC shows SHORT_SQUEEZE signal ($1.02B short vs $0.42B long liquidations, L/S ratio 0.41), but RSI 55.9 is not oversold, requiring right-side confirmation; SOL and ETH have LONG_FLUSH risks (long liq > short liq), but SOL shows whale acceleration (24h sentiment 0.60 vs 7d 0.24). Selected 【Scenario】3 (Whale Front-Run): follow SOL accumulation signal, but strictly wait for ADX > 20 and right-side breakout confirmation to avoid left-side knife-catching.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市宏观环境（价格低于SMA200），但存在结构性矛盾：全球宏观呈现Risk-Off（VIX飙升、DXY走强），而日元疲软暗示潜在风险资本流动。加密货币内部，Qlib排名显示BTC（#1）和BNB（#2）相对强势，但Z-Score异常显著：BTC资金费率Z-Score为-2.25（极端负值），DOGE为-2.42，表明零售空头过度拥挤，可能形成轧空燃料。结合【痛苦交易】分析，BTC出现SHORT_SQUEEZE信号（空头爆仓$11.3亿 vs 多头$3.3亿，比率0.29），而SOL存在LONG_FLUSH风险（多头爆仓比率3.21）。【战场纪律】要求：ADX均低于20（趋势不明），禁止新开方向性头寸；需等待右侧确认。选择【假设分析】剧本：监控BTC潜在轧空机会，但当前以观望为主，优先管理现有持仓风险。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear macro regime (price < SMA200), but with structural contradictions: global macro shows Risk-Off (VIX spiking, DXY strengthening), while Yen weakness hints at underlying risk capital flows. Internally, Qlib rankings show BTC (#1) and BNB (#2) relatively strong, but Z-Score anomalies are significant: BTC funding Z-Score -2.25 and DOGE -2.42 indicate extreme retail short crowding, potentially forming squeeze fuel. Combined with 【Pain Trade】analysis, BTC shows a SHORT_SQUEEZE signal (short liquidations $1.13B vs long $0.33B, ratio 0.29), while SOL has LONG_FLUSH risk (long/short liquidation ratio 3.21). 【Tactical Discipline】mandates: ADX all below 20 (no trend), prohibiting new directional positions; await right-side confirmation. Selected 【Scenario】: Monitor BTC for potential squeeze, but currently prioritize观望 and manage existing position risks.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI处于中性区间（42-56），ADX均低于20（趋势弱），NATR中等（1.82%-2.94%）；2) 上下影线比率：SOL下影线20%显示一定支撑，但上影线14%阻力较弱；3) 多空爆仓比：SOL为2.93（多头清算主导），ETH为1.32（平衡），BTC为0.76（平衡）；4) 鲸鱼净流向：SOL和ETH均为净流出。结论：KNIFE（接飞刀风险）——市场趋势弱且鲸鱼流出，左侧做多风险高；需等待ADX > 20或右侧突破确认。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI in neutral range (42-56), ADX all <20 (weak trend), NATR moderate (1.82%-2.94%); 2) Wick Ratios: SOL lower wick 20% shows some support, but upper wick 14% weak resistance; 3) Liquidation Ratios: SOL 2.93 (long flush dominant), ETH 1.32 (balanced), BTC 0.76 (balanced); 4) Whale Net Flow: SOL and ETH both negative. Verdict: KNIFE (falling knife risk) – weak trend and whale outflows make left-side longs risky; wait for ADX >20 or right-side breakout confirmation.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（所有币种价格低于SMA200），宏观环境矛盾：日元疲软（风险偏好）但DXY走强、VIX飙升（风险规避）。比特币和以太坊出现大规模多头爆仓（L/S比率分别为4.94和9.54），显示零售多头正在被清洗，但鲸鱼数据未显示明显吸筹（ETH 24h净流出247万枚，SOL 24h净流入9848枚但7d趋势较弱）。【痛苦交易】BTC和ETH的极端多头爆仓提供了下跌燃料，但未出现RSI<30的极端超卖或长下影线确认支撑，属于“接飞刀”风险。【假设分析】选择“鲸鱼领先”剧本，但需等待右侧确认信号。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality】Market is in bear regime (all coins below SMA200). Macro shows contradictions: Yen weakness (risk-on) vs DXY strength & VIX spike (risk-off). BTC and ETH show massive long liquidations (L/S ratios 4.94 and 9.54), indicating retail long flush, but whale data lacks strong accumulation (ETH 24h net outflow 2.47M coins, SOL 24h inflow 9.8K coins but weak 7d trend). 【Pain Trade】Extreme long liquidations in BTC/ETH provide downside fuel, but no RSI<30 oversold extremes or long lower wicks confirming support—this is 'falling knife' risk. 【Scenario】Select 'Whale Front-Run' scenario but require right-side confirmation.

SOL 24h inflow 9.8K coins but weak 7d trend (24h sentiment 0.62 vs 7d 0.12)—accumulation not sustained. Funding: BNB/SOL negative (-0.0125%/-0.0087%)—retail shorts crowded; BTC/ETH positive (0.0068%/0.0015%)—retail longs crowded. Liquidations: BTC/ETH show heavy long liquidations (L/S ratios 4.94/9.54), indicating flush risk.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib排名：BNB（0.0204）> BTC（0.0122）> SOL（-0.0045）> ETH（-0.0194）> DOGE（-0.1086）。BNB相对最强但分数绝对值低。Z-Score异常：成交量Z-Score全部为负（-1.7至-2.16），显示市场活跃度低迷；资金费率Z-Score：BNB（-1.91）和DOGE（-1.78）显著负偏离，SOL（-0.58）轻微负偏离，BTC（1.01）正偏离。统计上，BNB和DOGE的负资金费率异常显著，可能预示轧空机会，但需结合趋势确认。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib ranking: BNB (0.0204) > BTC (0.0122) > SOL (-0.0045) > ETH (-0.0194) > DOGE (-0.1086). BNB relatively strongest but absolute score low. Z-Score anomalies: Volume Z-Scores all negative (-1.7 to -2.16), indicating low activity. Funding Z-Scores: BNB (-1.91) and DOGE (-1.78) show significant negative deviations, SOL (-0.58) mildly negative, BTC (1.01) positive. Statistically, BNB and DOGE's negative funding anomalies are notable, suggesting squeeze potential, but require trend confirmation.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】评估：1) RSI中性（40-53），ADX均<20（无趋势），NATR中等（1.8%-2.9%）；2) 上下影线比率：BNB上影17%/下影13%显示平衡，DOGE下影52%显著但处于下跌趋势；3) 多空爆仓比：BTC和ETH极高（4.94/9.54），显示多头踩踏；4) 鲸鱼净流向：ETH持续流出，SOL流入不持续。结论：KNIFE（接飞刀风险）—市场处于熊市，ADX<20无趋势，RSI未超卖，大规模多头爆仓可能继续推动下跌，鲸鱼未明显吸筹，左侧做多危险。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Assessment: 1) RSI neutral (40-53), ADX all <20 (no trend), NATR moderate (1.8%-2.9%); 2) Wick ratios: BNB upper 17%/lower 13% balanced, DOGE lower 52% notable but in downtrend; 3) Liquidation L/S ratios: BTC/ETH extremely high (4.94/9.54), indicating long flush; 4) Whale net flow: ETH outflowing, SOL inflow not sustained. Verdict: KNIFE (falling knife risk)—market in bear regime, ADX<20 trendless, RSI not oversold, heavy long liquidations may drive further downside, whales not accumulating significantly, left-side longs dangerous.

analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200), but macro signals are conflicting: Yen weakness (risk-on) vs DXY strength and VIX rise (risk-off). Qlib rankings show BTC/BNB as strongest, but Z-Scores indicate universally low volume (all vol_z < -1.7), suggesting lack of momentum and potentially overpriced bearish sentiment. Combining 【Pain Trade】, SOL and BNB show clear short-squeeze signals (L/S ratios 0.36 and 0.16, negative funding), but caution is needed due to ADX < 20 (no clear trend). Selected 【Scenario】3 (Whale Front-Run): SOL's 24h sentiment score 0.71 is much higher than 7d 0.12, with token net inflow of 9,848.3 SOL, indicating whale accumulation during price drop, while retail shorts are crowded (negative funding), providing squeeze fuel.

SOL ranks third (0.0168), but its funding Z-Score (-0.17) and spiking sentiment score (0.71) contrast, supporting the whale front-run scenario.

regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI neutral (52.2), ADX 17.2 < 20 (no trend), NATR 2.91% (moderate volatility); 2) Lower wick ratio 35%/47% (shows support); 3) Liquidation L/S ratio 0.36 (short liquidations dominate); 4) Whale token net inflow 9,848.3 SOL (accumulation signal). Final verdict: SAFE_MR (Safe Mean Reversion) – despite ADX below 20, whale accumulation, negative funding, and short liquidation ratio provide a relatively safe basis for mean reversion, pending right-side confirmation (e.g., break above 4H prior high).

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），宏观呈现风险规避信号（DXY走强、VIX高位），但Layer 2消息中性偏积极。价格下跌与鲸鱼行为出现关键分歧：SOL显示24小时情绪得分0.79远高于7天0.20，且代币净流入184,563 SOL，表明鲸鱼在价格下跌中加速吸筹，而零售端因负资金费率（-0.0075%）和大量多头清算（L/S比率2.69）正在恐慌性抛售，形成典型的“鲸鱼陷阱”信号。Qlib排名将SOL列为第2（得分0.0115），但成交量Z-Score异常低（-2.29），显示市场参与度不足，这可能放大轧空潜力。结合【痛苦交易】分析，SOL存在明确的轧空燃料（拥挤的零售空头+多头清算），但必须等待右侧确认以避免接飞刀。选择【假设分析】剧本3：鲸鱼抢先交易——跟随智能资金在零售恐慌时积累。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price below SMA200), with macro risk-off signals (strong DXY, high VIX), but Layer 2 news is neutral-to-positive. A key divergence emerges between price action and whale behavior: SOL shows a 24h sentiment score of 0.79 vs 7d 0.20, with token net inflow of 184,563 SOL, indicating accelerated whale accumulation during the price drop, while retail panics with negative funding (-0.0075%) and high long liquidations (L/S ratio 2.69), forming a classic 'whale trap' signal. Qlib ranks SOL #2 (score 0.0115), but volume Z-Score is anomalously low (-2.29), suggesting low market participation that could amplify squeeze potential. Per 【Pain Trade】analysis, SOL has clear squeeze fuel (crowded retail shorts + long flush), but right-side confirmation is required to avoid catching a falling knife. Selected 【Hypothesis】Scenario 3: Whale Front-Run – betting on smart money accumulation amid retail fear.

technical_signal.zh: SOL技术面：RSI 50.75（中性），ADX 14.3（<20，无趋势），NATR 2.81%（中等波动），布林带宽度0.112（收缩），价格83.99美元处于下跌趋势中。影线比率：上影20%/下影40%，显示下方有买盘支撑。
technical_signal.en: SOL technicals: RSI 50.75 (neutral), ADX 14.3 (<20, no trend), NATR 2.81% (moderate volatility), Bollinger Width 0.112 (contracting), price $83.99 in downtrend. Wick ratios: upper 20%/lower 40%, indicating buying support below.

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：SOL代币净流入184,563 SOL（24小时），7天净流入1,577,994 SOL，显示持续积累。资金费率-0.0075%（负值，零售空头拥挤），资金Z-Score 0.96（略高但未极端）。清算数据：24小时多头清算241万美元 vs 空头清算89.7万美元，L/S比率2.69，表明零售多头被大量清洗，为轧空提供燃料。
macro_onchain.en: Whale data: SOL token net inflow 184,563 SOL (24h), 7d net inflow 1,577,994 SOL, showing sustained accumulation. Funding rate -0.0075% (negative, crowded retail shorts), funding Z-Score 0.96 (elevated but not extreme). Liquidation data: 24h long liquidations $2.414M vs short $0.897M, L/S ratio 2.69, indicating heavy retail long flush, providing squeeze fuel.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib分析：SOL排名第2（得分0.0115），相对强度优于BTC、ETH和DOGE。异常探测：成交量Z-Score -2.29显著低于均值，表明交易活动低迷，这可能意味着当前下跌动能不足，容易在消息催化下反转。资金Z-Score 0.96显示资金费率略高于历史常态，但未达极端水平，结合负的实际费率，暗示空头拥挤但未过度。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib analysis: SOL ranked #2 (score 0.0115), showing relative strength over BTC, ETH, and DOGE. Anomaly detection: Volume Z-Score -2.29 is significantly below mean, indicating depressed trading activity, which may suggest weak downward momentum prone to reversal on catalysts. Funding Z-Score 0.96 shows funding rate slightly above historical norm but not extreme, combined with negative actual rate, implying crowded shorts but not excessive.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI 50.75（非极端），ADX 14.3（<20，无趋势），NATR 2.81%（中等）；2) 下影线比率40%（较高），显示买盘拒绝；3) 多空爆仓比2.69（多头被清洗）；4) 鲸鱼代币净流向为正（积累）。综合判断：当前非KNIFE（无RSI<30或强烈下跌动量），非ROCKET（无RSI>70或强劲上涨趋势），但ADX<20触发【战场纪律】的“无交易区”规则，禁止开新仓。因此，需等待ADX突破20并出现右侧确认（如突破4H前高）。结论：SAFE_MR条件不满足，因无RSI极端值；当前状态为“等待趋势确认”。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI 50.75 (not extreme), ADX 14.3 (<20, no trend), NATR 2.81% (moderate); 2) Lower wick ratio 40% (high), showing buying rejection; 3) Liquidation L/S ratio 2.69 (longs flushed); 4) Whale token net flow positive (accumulation). Overall verdict: Not KNIFE (no RSI<30 or strong downward momentum), not ROCKET (no RSI>70 or strong uptrend), but ADX<20 triggers the 【Tactical Discipline】'no-trade zone' rule, prohibiting new positions. Thus, must wait for ADX to break above 20 and right-side confirmation (e.g., break above 4H prior high). Conclusion: SAFE_MR conditions not met due to lack of RSI extremes; current state is 'awaiting trend confirmation'.

reflection.zh: 从历史交易中学到：在ADX<20时开仓（如之前的ETH和SOL多头）易受震荡止损；必须严格遵守“无趋势不交易”规则，即使有鲸鱼信号也需等待趋势确认。
reflection.en: Learned from trade history: Opening positions when ADX<20 (e.g., previous ETH and SOL longs) risks whipsaw stops; must strictly adhere to 'no trade without trend' rule, even with whale signals, awaiting trend confirmation.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市结构（所有主要币种价格低于SMA200），缺乏新的催化剂，价格下跌与宏观风险规避（DXY走强、VIX正常）一致，属于已定价的熊市延续而非新冲击。Qlib排名显示BNB相对最强（-0.0099分），但所有币种得分均为负值，表明整体市场疲软；Z-Score异常显示BNB和DOGE的资金费率Z-Score较高（0.74和0.76），暗示零售多头拥挤，而SOL和ETH的成交量Z-Score极低（-2.22和-2.23），反映流动性枯竭。【痛苦交易与纪律】SOL和BNB的L/S爆仓比分别为3.23和2.19，显示零售多头正在被清洗，但价格下跌中未见鲸鱼大量吸筹（SOL 24h净流入18.4万枚但7d趋势更强，ETH 24h净流出8.3万枚），且ADX均低于20（趋势缺失），根据纪律禁止开仓。选择【假设分析】剧本3（鲸鱼前置），但等待右侧确认信号。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear structure (all major coins below SMA200) with no new catalysts; price declines align with macro risk-off (DXY strength, normal VIX), representing priced-in bear continuation rather than a new shock. Qlib rankings show BNB as relatively strongest (-0.0099 score), but all coins have negative scores, indicating overall weakness; Z-Score anomalies reveal high funding Z-Scores for BNB and DOGE (0.74 and 0.76), suggesting crowded retail longs, while SOL and ETH have extremely low volume Z-Scores (-2.22 and -2.23), reflecting liquidity drain.【Pain Trade & Discipline】SOL and BNB have L/S liquidation ratios of 3.23 and 2.19, showing retail long flushes, but no extreme whale accumulation during price drops (SOL 24h net inflow 184k vs stronger 7d trend, ETH 24h net outflow 83k), and ADX is below 20 for all (no trend), prohibiting entries per discipline. Selected【Scenario】3 (Whale Front-Run), but awaiting right-side confirmation.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：所有币种RSI处于43-49中性偏弱区间，ADX均低于20（SOL 15.2，ETH 15.5，BTC 14.0，BNB 12.8，DOGE 14.4），表明市场缺乏趋势；NATR在1.70%-2.91%之间，波动性中等；上下影线显示SOL下影线63%（支撑迹象），DOGE下影线90%（超卖）。

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：SOL 24h净流入18.4万枚（7d净流入158万枚），显示持续吸筹，但24h情绪得分0.63高于7d的0.18，暗示近期加速；ETH 24h净流出8.3万枚（7d净流出441万枚），鲸鱼仍在分发。资金费率：BNB和DOGE为正（0.0100%和0.0055%），零售多头拥挤；SOL为负（-0.0029%），零售空头略多。
macro_onchain.en: Whale Data: SOL 24h net inflow 184k (7d inflow 1.58M) shows sustained accumulation, with 24h sentiment 0.63 > 7d 0.18 indicating recent acceleration; ETH 24h net outflow 83k (7d outflow 4.41M) suggests continued distribution. Funding: BNB and DOGE positive (0.0100% and 0.0055%) indicate crowded retail longs; SOL negative (-0.0029%) shows slight retail short crowding.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib分析：BNB排名第一（-0.0099分），但得分负值反映整体市场疲软；BTC排名第二（-0.019分），SOL第三（-0.0289分）。Z-Score异常：BNB和DOGE的资金费率Z-Score较高（0.74和0.76），统计上显著偏离均值，警告零售多头过度；SOL和ETH的成交量Z-Score极低（-2.22和-2.23），表明流动性不足，可能放大波动。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib Analysis: BNB ranks first (-0.0099 score), but negative scores reflect overall market weakness; BTC second (-0.019), SOL third (-0.0289). Z-Score Anomalies: High funding Z-Scores for BNB and DOGE (0.74 and 0.76) are statistically significant deviations, warning of crowded retail longs; extremely low volume Z-Scores for SOL and ETH (-2.22 and -2.23) indicate liquidity drain, potentially amplifying volatility.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI 43-49中性偏弱，ADX均<20（无趋势），NATR中等（1.70%-2.91%）；2) 上下影线比率：SOL下影线63%，DOGE下影线90%，显示支撑但未确认；3) 多空爆仓比：SOL 3.23和BNB 2.19显示零售多头被清洗，但未达极端（如>5）；4) 鲸鱼净流向：SOL净流入但加速不明显，ETH净流出。综合判断：当前为KNIFE（接飞刀风险）——价格下跌中RSI未超卖（>30），ADX<20趋势缺失，鲸鱼未大规模吸筹，禁止左侧做多；同时非ROCKET（无强势上涨）。等待右侧信号（如4H突破前高）或RSI<30+鲸鱼流入确认。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI 43-49 neutral-weak, ADX all <20 (no trend), NATR moderate (1.70%-2.91%); 2) Wick Ratios: SOL lower wick 63%, DOGE lower wick 90% show support but unconfirmed; 3) Liquidation L/S Ratios: SOL 3.23 and BNB 2.19 indicate retail long flushes, not extreme (e.g., >5); 4) Whale Net Flow: SOL inflow but acceleration weak, ETH outflow. Verdict: KNIFE (falling knife risk)—price declining with RSI not oversold (>30), ADX<20 no trend, no massive whale accumulation, prohibit left-side longs; not ROCKET (no strong rally). Await right-side confirmation (e.g., 4H break above prior high) or RSI<30 + whale inflow.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），但宏观流动性条件改善（美联储降息预期、日元走弱）与加密市场极端恐惧（BTC恐惧贪婪指数10）形成背离，表明风险情绪可能转向但尚未完全定价。Qlib排名显示BNB（第1）、BTC（第2）、SOL（第3）相对强势，但Z-Score异常显示成交量普遍偏低（vol_z均<-2），市场流动性不足。结合【痛苦交易】，SOL和BNB存在明显的多头爆仓风险（L/S比率>3），但SOL有鲸鱼积累信号（24h情绪0.51>7d 0.16，代币净流入），而ETH和BTC爆仓比平衡（~1.8），无极端拥挤。根据【战场纪律】，ADX均<20（趋势缺失），禁止新开方向性头寸；当前无持仓，需等待趋势确认。选择【假设分析】剧本：等待ADX突破20后的趋势跟随机会，优先关注SOL（鲸鱼积累+多头爆仓燃料）或BTC（平衡爆仓+低资金费率）。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200), but improving macro liquidity (Fed rate cut expectations, Yen weakness) diverges from extreme crypto fear (BTC Fear/Greed: 10), suggesting potential risk-on shift not yet fully priced. Qlib rankings show BNB (#1), BTC (#2), SOL (#3) relatively strong, but Z-Score anomalies indicate low volume across all coins (vol_z all <-2), signaling poor liquidity. Combining 【Pain Trade】, SOL and BNB show clear long flush risks (L/S ratio >3), but SOL has whale accumulation signals (24h sentiment 0.51 > 7d 0.16, token net inflow), while ETH and BTC have balanced liquidation ratios (~1.8) with no extreme crowding. Per 【Tactical Discipline】, ADX all <20 (no trend), prohibiting new directional entries; no current positions, await trend confirmation. Selected 【Scenario】: Wait for ADX to break above 20 for trend-following opportunities, prioritizing SOL (whale accumulation + long liquidation fuel) or BTC (balanced liquidation + low funding).

Verdict: KNIFE — ADX<20 with no clear trend, RSI not extreme, mixed whale signals, immediate entry risks whipsaw; wait for ADX>20 or RSI extreme + wick confirmation.

analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200) with mixed macro signals (dovish Fed expectations vs strong DXY) and extreme crypto fear (BTC Fear & Greed: 10). Qlib ranks show BNB (#1) and SOL (#2) as relatively strong, but Z-Scores indicate universally low volume (vol_z all <-1.88), signaling poor liquidity. 【Pain Trade】 analysis reveals significant long liquidations in BTC and ETH (L/S ratios >3.38), indicating retail long flush, but whale data shows no clear accumulation (ETH 24h net outflow 2.07M tokens, SOL 24h net inflow 241.6K tokens but 7d trend is stronger). 【Tactical Discipline】 mandates ADX >20 for new directional positions, yet all coins have ADX <20 (14.0-17.8), indicating trendless conditions—no new directional trades allowed. regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI State: BNB 58.7, ETH 55.9, SOL 56.0, BTC 53.3, DOGE 48.9, all in neutral range (30-70), no extremes; ADX State: All coins have ADX below or near 20 (BNB 16.4, ETH 20.6, SOL 19.9, BTC 16.7, DOGE 17.5), indicating no clear trend; NATR State: BNB 1.65%, ETH 2.60%, SOL 2.81%, BTC 1.89%, DOGE 2.71%, within normal volatility ranges. 2) Wick Ratios: SOL lower wick 48%, BNB lower wick 35%, showing some support; ETH lower wick 47%, BTC lower wick 56%, indicating buyer interest during drops. 3) Liquidation Ratios: SOL and BNB have very low L/S ratios (0.14 and 0.09), indicating short-squeeze fuel; ETH and BTC are balanced. 4) Whale Net Flow: SOL net inflow (accumulation), ETH net outflow (distribution). Final Verdict: The market is overall in a 'no-trend' state with ADX < 20, prohibiting new positions per tactical discipline. No 'KNIFE' or 'ROCKET' risks, but also not meeting 'SAFE_MR' conditions.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），但宏观环境出现矛盾信号：美联储降息预期（-6.5bps）和美元走弱（DXY -0.24%）暗示风险偏好可能回升，而加密市场恐惧指数（14）显示零售情绪极度悲观。这种分歧表明坏消息可能已定价，而鲸鱼正在悄然布局。参考【Qlib排名】，BNB（第1）和SOL（第2）相对强势，但成交量Z-Score均为负值（-1.92/-2.06），显示市场活跃度低迷。结合【痛苦交易】，SOL和BNB的爆仓比（L/S=0.12/0.06）极低，表明空头仓位过度拥挤，存在轧空燃料；而ETH的爆仓比（3.10）显示多头正在被清洗。遵循【战场纪律】，当前ADX均低于21（趋势弱），需等待右侧确认。选择【假设分析】剧本3（鲸鱼前置）：跟随鲸鱼在SOL和BNB的积累信号，但仅当价格突破4H前高时入场。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200), but macro shows conflicting signals: Fed dovish expectations (-6.5bps) and weaker DXY (-0.24%) suggest potential risk-on rotation, while crypto fear index (14) indicates extreme retail pessimism. This divergence implies bad news may be priced in, with whales quietly accumulating. Referencing 【Qlib rankings】, BNB (#1) and SOL (#2) show relative strength, but volume Z-Scores are negative (-1.92/-2.06), indicating low market activity. Combining 【Pain Trade】, SOL and BNB have extremely low liquidation ratios (L/S=0.12/0.06), signaling crowded shorts and squeeze fuel; ETH's ratio (3.10) shows long flush. Adhering to 【Tactical Discipline】, ADX is below 21 (weak trend), requiring right-side confirmation. Selected 【Hypothesis】Scenario 3 (Whale Front-Run): follow whale accumulation in SOL and BNB, but only enter on break above 4H prior highs.

BNB has no token flow data, but extremely low liquidation ratio (0.06) suggests crowded shorts. ETH has token net outflow (-1.8M ETH) and high long liquidations ($76M), showing distribution. Funding Rates: SOL and BNB at 0.0100% (slightly positive), DOGE at 0.0100%, ETH and BTC near neutral (0.0023%/0.0010%), no extreme crowding.

quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib Analysis: BNB ranks #1 (score 0.0614), SOL #2 (0.0507), ETH #3 (0.0452), BTC #4 (0.0094), DOGE #5 (-0.0286). Z-Score Anomalies: All coins have significantly negative volume Z-Scores (-1.80 to -2.06), indicating abnormally low market participation that may amplify price moves. Funding Z-Scores: DOGE highest (1.54), but not extreme, no statistically significant anomalies.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI中性（47-55），ADX均低于21（趋势弱），NATR正常（1.65%-2.78%）；2) 上下影线比率：SOL上影59%显示买入拒绝，ETH下影52%显示卖出压力；3) 多空爆仓比：SOL和BNB极低（0.12/0.06）表明空头拥挤，ETH高（3.10）表明多头被清洗；4) 鲸鱼净流向：SOL积极积累，ETH分发。结论：当前市场处于【SAFE_MR】状态——无强烈趋势（ADX<20），但SOL和BNB存在均值回归机会（空头拥挤+鲸鱼积累），需等待右侧突破确认，避免左側入场风险。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI neutral (47-55), ADX all below 21 (weak trend), NATR normal (1.65%-2.78%); 2) Wick Ratios: SOL upper 59% shows buying rejection, ETH lower 52% shows selling pressure; 3) Liquidation Ratios: SOL and BNB extremely low (0.12/0.06) indicate crowded shorts, ETH high (3.10) indicates long flush; 4) Whale Net Flow: SOL accumulating, ETH distributing. Verdict: 【SAFE_MR】— no strong trend (ADX<20), but SOL and BNB offer mean reversion opportunities (crowded shorts + whale accumulation), requiring right-side breakout confirmation to avoid left-side entry risks.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib分析：BNB排名第1（qlib_score -0.1447），但得分仍为负，市场整体偏弱。Z-Score异常：BNB funding_z -1.93，BTC funding_z -2.03，SOL funding_z -1.14，均低于-1.0标准差，统计显著表明资金费率极端负值，散户做空过度，增加轧空概率。成交量Z-Score均为负（-1.50至-1.69），显示低成交量，可能缺乏动能。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib analysis: BNB ranks #1 (qlib_score -0.1447) but score negative, overall market weak. Z-Score anomalies: BNB funding_z -1.93, BTC funding_z -2.03, SOL funding_z -1.14, all below -1.0 std dev, statistically significant extreme negative funding, overcrowded retail shorts, increasing squeeze likelihood. Volume Z-Scores all negative (-1.50 to -1.69), indicating low volume, possibly lacking momentum.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI均低于37（超卖），ADX>25（趋势强），NATR中等（无飙升）；2) 影线：SOL下影线40%（高），显示买盘拒绝；3) 爆仓比：SOL L/S=5.27（多头踩踏），但资金费率为负（-0.0165%），散户做空提供轧空燃料；4) 鲸鱼净流向：SOL代币净流入（鲸鱼吸筹）。结论：SAFE_MR（安全均值回归）——RSI超卖+鲸鱼吸筹+散户做空拥挤，但需等待右侧确认（如4H突破前高）以避免接飞刀。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI all below 37 (oversold), ADX>25 (strong trend), NATR moderate (no spike); 2) Wick: SOL lower wick 40% (high, showing buyer rejection); 3) Liquidation ratio: SOL L/S=5.27 (long flush), but funding negative (-0.0165%), crowded shorts provide squeeze fuel; 4) Whale net flow: SOL token inflow (whale accumulation). Verdict: SAFE_MR – oversold RSI + whale accumulation + crowded shorts, but await right-side confirmation (e.g., 4H break above prior high) to avoid falling knife.

portfolio_status.zh: 当前持仓：无。总权益$3844.57，现金$3844.57。可用多头额度$1835，空头额度$1835。风险：市场处于熊市，需谨慎做多，仅限鲸鱼信号+轧空机会。
portfolio_status.en: Portfolio: No positions. Total equity $3844.57, cash $3844.57. Available long room $1835, short room $1835. Risk: Bear market regime, cautious on longs, only for whale signals + squeeze opportunities.

reflection.zh: 从历史交易反思：需更严格执行右侧入场（如等待4H突破），避免在趋势中过早逆势。本次决策基于鲸鱼吸筹与散户踩踏的背离，但坚持纪律等待确认。
reflection.en: Reflection from trade history: Need stricter right-side entry (e.g., wait for 4H break) to avoid premature counter-trend moves. This decision based on whale-retail divergence, but discipline to await confirmation.

entry_reason.zh: 发现鲸鱼在价格下跌中加速吸筹（24h情绪分0.88 vs 7d 0.07，代币净流入2569.9 SOL），资金费率负值（-0.0165%）显示散户做空拥挤，L/S爆仓比5.27表明多头被强平，形成轧空燃料。技术面RSI 34.8超卖，下影线40%显示支撑。等待右侧确认：价格突破4H前高$79.5后入场。
entry_reason.en: Whale accumulation accelerating during price drop (24h sentiment 0.88 vs 7d 0.07, token net inflow 2569.9 SOL), negative funding (-0.0165%) shows crowded retail shorts, L/S ratio 5.27 indicates long flush, creating squeeze fuel. Technicals: RSI 34.8 oversold, lower wick 40% shows support. Await right-side confirmation: enter after price breaks above 4H prior high $79.5.

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破$75（关键支撑），或鲸鱼数据转向流出，或资金费率转正（散户追多），则止损。
invalidation.en: Invalidate if price breaks below $75 (key support), whale data turns to outflow, or funding becomes positive (retail chasing longs).

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），宏观环境矛盾：日元疲软显示风险偏好，但加密市场极度恐惧（11）且地缘政治紧张。新闻叙事偏空，但价格已大幅下跌，可能部分定价。Qlib排名显示BNB相对最强（-0.1413），但所有币种分数均为负值，表明整体弱势。Z-Score异常：BNB、SOL、DOGE的资金费率Z-Score均低于-1.0（统计显著负值），显示零售过度做空，为轧空提供燃料。结合【痛苦交易】，SOL、BNB、BTC的多空爆仓比极高（6.90、182.18、3.69），显示零售多头正被大规模清洗，而鲸鱼数据（SOL 24h净流入2,569.9 SOL vs 7d流入1,336,367.8 SOL）表明鲸鱼在下跌中持续积累，形成【鲸鱼陷阱】。遵循【战场纪律】，ADX均>20（BNB除外），允许趋势交易；但需等待右侧确认（如4H突破前高）。选择【假设分析】剧本3：鲸鱼前置交易——在零售恐慌性抛售（高爆仓）时跟随鲸鱼积累信号做多，捕捉潜在轧空反弹。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】Market is in bear regime (price < SMA200), with conflicting macro signals: JPY weakness suggests risk-on, but crypto extreme fear (11) and geopolitical tensions create headwinds. News narrative is bearish, but prices have dropped significantly, possibly partially priced in. Qlib ranking shows BNB relatively strongest (-0.1413), but all coins have negative scores, indicating overall weakness. Z-Score anomalies: BNB, SOL, DOGE have funding Z-Scores below -1.0 (statistically significant negative), showing retail overly short, providing squeeze fuel. Combined with 【Pain Trade】, SOL, BNB, BTC have extreme long/short liquidation ratios (6.90, 182.18, 3.69), indicating retail longs are being flushed, while whale data (SOL 24h net inflow 2,569.9 SOL vs 7d inflow 1,336,367.8 SOL) shows whales accumulating during dips, forming a 【Whale Trap】. Following 【Tactical Discipline】, ADX >20 for most (except BNB), allowing trend trades; but await right-side confirmation (e.g., 4H break above prior high). Selected 【Scenario】3: Whale Front-Run – go long on whale accumulation signals during retail panic (high liquidations) to catch potential squeeze rebounds.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：所有币种RSI均处于超卖区域（31-37），ADX除BNB（20.2）外均>24，显示下跌趋势强劲。波动率（NATR 1.70%-2.79%）适中，下影线比率低（SOL 0%，DOGE 8%），表明买方尚未介入。
technical_signal.en: Technical: All coins have RSI in oversold zone (31-37), ADX >24 except BNB (20.2), indicating strong downtrend. Volatility (NATR 1.70%-2.79%) moderate, lower wick ratios low (SOL 0%, DOGE 8%), showing no buyer rejection yet.

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：SOL显示24h净流入2,569.9 SOL（7d净流入1,336,367.8 SOL），表明鲸鱼在下跌中积累；ETH 24h净流出-1,448,749.4 ETH，显示分配。资金费率：BNB、SOL、DOGE为负（-0.0111%至-0.0062%），零售做空拥挤，轧空风险高。爆仓数据：SOL、BNB、BTC多空比极高（6.90、182.18、3.69），零售多头正被清洗。
macro_onchain.en: Whale data: SOL shows 24h net inflow 2,569.9 SOL (7d inflow 1,336,367.8 SOL), indicating whale accumulation during dips; ETH 24h net outflow -1,448,749.4 ETH, showing distribution. Funding rates: BNB, SOL, DOGE negative (-0.0111% to -0.0062%), retail short crowding, high squeeze risk. Liquidation: SOL, BNB, BTC have extreme long/short ratios (6.90, 182.18, 3.69), retail longs being flushed.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib排名：BNB排名第一（-0.1413），但分数负值表明整体弱势。Z-Score异常：BNB资金费率Z-Score -1.53，SOL -0.65，DOGE -1.04，均显著低于均值，统计上显示零售过度做空，为均值回归提供信号。成交量Z-Score全为负（-1.4至-1.66），表明市场参与度低。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib ranking: BNB ranks first (-0.1413), but negative scores indicate overall weakness. Z-Score anomalies: BNB funding Z-Score -1.53, SOL -0.65, DOGE -1.04, all significantly below mean, statistically showing retail overly short, signaling mean reversion. Volume Z-Scores all negative (-1.4 to -1.66), indicating low market participation.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】评估：1) RSI超卖（31-37），ADX除BNB外均>24（趋势强劲），NATR适中（1.70%-2.79%）；2) 下影线比率低（SOL 0%，DOGE 8%），无买方拒绝信号；3) 多空爆仓比极高（SOL 6.90，BNB 182.18），零售多头正被清洗；4) 鲸鱼净流向：SOL流入（积累），ETH流出（分配）。结论：KNIFE（接飞刀风险）——价格下跌有动量（ADX高），买方未介入（低影线），鲸鱼积累信号但需右侧确认。避免盲目做多，等待4H蜡烛收高或RSI背离。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Assessment: 1) RSI oversold (31-37), ADX >24 except BNB (strong trend), NATR moderate (1.70%-2.79%); 2) Lower wick ratios low (SOL 0%, DOGE 8%), no buyer rejection; 3) Long/short liquidation ratios extreme (SOL 6.90, BNB 182.18), retail longs being flushed; 4) Whale net flow: SOL inflow (accumulation), ETH outflow (distribution). Verdict: KNIFE – price drop has momentum (high ADX), no buyer stepping in (low wicks), whale accumulation signal but needs right-side confirmation. Avoid blind longs, wait for 4H candle close higher or RSI divergence.

portfolio_status.zh: 当前持仓：无。总权益$3844.3，现金$3844.3。可用多头额度$1835，空头额度$1835。风险可控，可开新仓但需遵守2%每单风险限制。
portfolio_status.en: Portfolio: No positions. Total equity $3844.3, cash $3844.3. Available long room $1835, short room $1835. Risk manageable, can open new trades but must adhere to 2% risk per trade limit.

reflection.zh: 从历史交易中学到：在熊市中，需优先做空，但极端超卖和负资金费率可提供轧空机会；必须等待右侧确认（如突破前高）以避免过早入场。当前市场显示鲸鱼积累与零售爆仓并存，但技术面仍有下跌动量，需谨慎。
reflection.en: Learned from history: In bear markets, prioritize shorts, but extreme oversold and negative funding can offer squeeze opportunities; must wait for right-side confirmation (e.g., break above prior high) to avoid early entries. Current market shows whale accumulation alongside retail liquidations, but technicals still have downward momentum, requiring caution.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），但宏观环境出现改善迹象（美联储转向鸽派、VIX回落），这可能是“坏消息+好价格”的鲸鱼陷阱信号。Qlib排名显示BNB相对最强（排名第1），但所有币种qlib_score均为负值，表明整体市场动能疲弱。Z-Score异常显示成交量普遍低迷（vol_z均低于-1.5），资金费率Z-Score除DOGE外均接近中性，DOGE的funding_z=-1.28显示零售空头拥挤。结合【痛苦交易】，BTC、ETH、SOL、BNB均出现极端多头爆仓比（L/S>3.5），尤其是BNB高达38.76，表明零售多头正在被清洗，而鲸鱼数据显示ETH和SOL的24h代币净流出（ETH -129万，SOL 0），但SOL的24h情绪得分0.65远高于7d的0.03，暗示短期积极积累。选择【假设分析】剧本3“鲸鱼前置交易”：在零售恐慌性抛售（多头爆仓）时跟随鲸鱼潜在积累信号。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200), but macro conditions are improving (Fed turning dovish, VIX subsiding), suggesting a potential 'bad news + good price' whale trap. Qlib rankings show BNB as relatively strongest (rank #1), but all coins have negative qlib_score, indicating weak overall momentum. Z-Score anomalies show universally low volume (vol_z all below -1.5), with funding Z-Scores mostly neutral except DOGE (funding_z=-1.28, indicating crowded retail shorts). 【Pain Trade】 analysis reveals extreme long liquidation ratios (L/S>3.5) for BTC, ETH, SOL, and BNB (BNB's 38.76 is particularly severe), showing retail long flush, while whale data shows ETH and SOL with 24h token net outflows (ETH -1.296M, SOL 0), but SOL's 24h sentiment score 0.65 is sharply higher than 7d's 0.03, hinting at short-term accumulation. Selected 【Scenario】3 'Whale Front-Run': betting on smart money accumulation during retail panic (long liquidations).

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：所有币种RSI处于40-50中性偏弱区间（DOGE最低40.77），ADX均高于20（BNB最低17.5接近无趋势阈值），表明存在弱趋势。NATR在1.46%-2.44%之间，波动率适中。上下影线显示BNB和SOL的上影线比率高达71%和85%，表明上方阻力强劲。
technical_signal.en: Technical: All coins have RSI in 40-50 neutral-weak range (DOGE lowest at 40.77), ADX all above 20 (BNB lowest at 17.5 near trendless threshold), indicating weak trends. NATR ranges 1.46%-2.44%, moderate volatility. Wick ratios show BNB and SOL with high upper wick ratios (71% and 85%), indicating strong overhead resistance.

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：ETH和SOL的24h代币净流出（ETH -129万，SOL 0），但SOL的24h情绪得分0.65显著高于7d的0.03，暗示短期积极情绪变化。稳定币净流出一致为负（ETH -$4630万，SOL -$11.4万），表明资金外流。资金费率：DOGE最负（-0.0074%），显示零售空头拥挤；BNB和BTC为正但很低（0.0010%-0.0033%），无严重拥挤。
macro_onchain.en: Whale Data: ETH and SOL show 24h token net outflows (ETH -1.296M, SOL 0), but SOL's 24h sentiment score 0.65 is sharply higher than 7d's 0.03, suggesting short-term positive sentiment shift. Stablecoin net flows are consistently negative (ETH -$46.3M, SOL -$113.9K), indicating capital outflow. Funding Rates: DOGE most negative (-0.0074%), showing crowded retail shorts; BNB and BTC positive but low (0.0010%-0.0033%), no severe crowding.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib分析：BNB排名第1（qlib_score -0.0007），相对最强，但得分仍为负值，表明在疲弱市场中稍具韧性。Z-Score异常：成交量Z-Score全部低于-1.5（SOL最低-1.74），显示市场参与度极低；DOGE的funding_z=-1.28具有统计显著性，表明空头过度拥挤，可能引发轧空。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib Analysis: BNB ranks #1 (qlib_score -0.0007), relatively strongest but still negative, indicating slight resilience in a weak market. Z-Score Anomalies: Volume Z-Scores all below -1.5 (SOL lowest -1.74), showing extremely low market participation; DOGE's funding_z=-1.28 is statistically significant, indicating oversold shorts prone to squeeze.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI处于40-50，ADX>20（除BNB接近阈值），NATR适中，无极端波动；2) 上下影线比率显示BNB和SOL上影线高（71%/85%），表明阻力，但无长下影线（BNB和SOL下影线比0%），缺乏底部支撑信号；3) 多空爆仓比极端偏向多头（L/S>3.5），零售多头正在被清洗；4) 鲸鱼净流向混合（ETH流出，SOL情绪改善）。结论：SAFE_MR（安全均值回归）——市场处于熊市但无垂直下跌动量，零售恐慌（多头爆仓）和DOGE空头拥挤提供均值回归机会，需等待右侧确认。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI in 40-50, ADX>20 (except BNB near threshold), NATR moderate, no extreme volatility; 2) Wick ratios show high upper wicks for BNB and SOL (71%/85%), indicating resistance, but no long lower wicks (0% for BNB/SOL), lacking bottom support signals; 3) Liquidation ratios extremely long-biased (L/S>3.5), retail longs being flushed; 4) Whale net flows mixed (ETH outflow, SOL sentiment improvement). Verdict: SAFE_MR – market in bear regime but no vertical momentum, retail panic (long liquidations) and DOGE short crowding offer mean reversion opportunities, awaiting right-side confirmation.

portfolio_status.zh: 当前持仓：DOGE多头（入场价0.09313，杠杆3x，价值$801），浮盈0.42%。可用多头额度$1052，空头额度$1853，未超限。风险：DOGE持仓符合熊市规则（资金费率负、RSI超卖），但需监控爆仓比变化。
portfolio_status.en: Portfolio: DOGE long (entry 0.09313, leverage 3x, value $801), floating PnL 0.42%. Available long room $1052, short room $1853, within limits. Risk: DOGE position aligns with bear regime rules (negative funding, oversold RSI), but monitor liquidation ratio changes.

reflection.zh: 从历史交易中学到：在熊市中，需优先利用零售恐慌（如多头爆仓）和资金费率异常进行均值回归交易，并严格遵守ADX>20和右侧确认规则以避免过早入场。
reflection.en: Learned from history: In bear markets, prioritize mean reversion trades using retail panic (e.g., long liquidations) and funding anomalies, and strictly adhere to ADX>20 and right-side confirmation rules to avoid early entries.
